programs.title: Witness for the Prosecution
programs.desc: An accused murderer's (Tyrone Power) wife (Marlene Dietrich) gives damaging testimony.

programs.title: Moby Dick
programs.desc: Herman Melville's mad Capt. Ahab (Gregory Peck) hunts the white whale that got his leg.

programs.title: The Bounty
programs.desc: Fletcher Christian (Mel Gibson) leads a mutiny against Lt. Bligh (Anthony Hopkins).

programs.title: Rob Roy
programs.desc: The Scottish folk hero fights for clan and honor, hunted by vile aristocrats in the 1700s.

programs.title: The Madness of King George
programs.desc: The monarch (Nigel Hawthorne) loves his queen (Helen Mirren) but deteriorates mentally.

programs.title: God's Own Country
programs.desc: A Romanian migrant worker sets a frustrated young farmer on a new path during lambing season.
